use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF INCREASING THE BIOAVAILABILITY OF GUAIFENESIN IN A SOLUTION CONTAINING 54% TO 66% BY WEIGHT OF PROPYLENE GLYCOL AND GLYCEROL, WHEREIN THE METHOD INCREASES THE CMAX BY AT LEAST 1.5 AND/OR INCREASES THE AUC (0-INF) BY AT LEAST 1.4
